ogTitle: White Hill vs White Sands: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in White Hill and White Sands.
heading: White Hill vs White Sands — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between White Hill, South Australia and White Sands, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: White Sands has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to White Hill (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is White Hill or White Sands safer from flooding?
faq.answer: White Hill has a flood risk score of 28/100, while White Sands scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: White Hill scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. White Sands scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in White Hill or White Sands?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. White Sands has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
